__description__: THIS FILE IS A STARTING POINT FOR AGENTS using the QuillBot MCP Server. It demonstrates a typical workflow.

args.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

expected_response.text: The swift brown fox leaps over the lethargic dog.
expected_response.legend_annotated_text: The [swift](changed) brown fox [leaps](changed) over the [lethargic](changed) dog.

workflow_steps.agent_action: Save the task_id. Read the annotated text to see what was changed.
Check if longest_unchanged_words is too long. If so, you must edit those words.
Find synonyms for the unchanged words.

expected_response.text: The swift auburn fox leaps over the lethargic dog.

workflow_steps.agent_action: Export the final version and show it to the user.
Delete the task cache from disk when completely done.
